name: D-Formation
description:
'''D-Formation''' is the stage name of Spanish DJ, record producer, remixer and record label owner '''Dimas Carbajo'''. He is associated with house, tech house, progressive house and melodic electronic music, and is the founder of the Spanish electronic music label BeatFreak Recordings.

During his career, D-Formation has released music through BeatFreak Recordings and other labels including Yoshitoshi Recordings, Suara, Stereo Productions, Toolroom and Nervous Records. In 2006, he was ranked number 39 in ''DJ Mag''{{'}}s ''Top 100 DJs'' poll.
